title: sonchus javanicus
intro: Sonchus javanicus, also known as the Javan thistle or Java sow thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Sonchus javanicus is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
